name: Yogurt Apple Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, salt, and cloves.
2. Add applesauce, first 1 1/4 cups yogurt, egg substitute, and oil; blend well using a spoon.
3. Stir in raisins.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan or 13 x 9-inch pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 50 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then loosen the cake from the sides of the pan with a knife.
7. Invert onto a plate and cover loosely with foil or wax paper. Allow to cool completely.
8. Slice and serve with Quick Yogurt Glaze (recipe follows).
